zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Lucas Cusack , Baron of Killeen於1333年出生在英國蘇格蘭奧可尼艾利蘭時，他的父親Walter Cusack Baron of Clonee and Killeen37歲，母親Joan Tuite25歲。他於大約1368年與Mathilde Fleming在愛爾蘭武爾斯特結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1388年9月之後在愛爾蘭庫迪 米亞斯吉勒，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭奧可尼艾利蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Lucas Cusack , Baron of Killeen于1333年出生在英国苏格兰奧可尼艾利蘭时，他的父亲Walter Cusack Baron of Clonee and Killeen37岁，母亲Joan Tuite25岁。他于大约1368年与Mathilde Fleming在爱尔兰武爾斯特结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1388年9月之后在爱尔兰庫迪 米亞斯吉勒，埋葬在英国苏格兰奧可尼艾利蘭。

nameMeanings.name: Cusack
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Aileen, Brigid, Eamon, Fergus, Seamus.

Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Cussac in Guienne, France, named with the Gallo-Roman personal name Cūcius or Cussius + the locative suffix -acum. The surname died out in England, but is common in Ireland, where it was imported at the time of the Anglo-Norman invasion in the 12th century. It has been Gaelicized as de Cíosóg.

variants.name: Cuzick
meanings: Irish and English (Worcestershire): variant of   Cusack  . This form of the surname is no longer found in Ireland and is rare in Britain.

variants.name: Cusick
meanings: Irish and Scottish: variant of   Cusack  , now found predominantly in Scotland.
Americanized form of Polish Kusik or Czech Kusík, Slovak Kúšik and Kušík.
Americanized form of Croatian Kusić, Croatian and Serbian Kušić (see Kusic ), or Serbian Ćušić (see Cusic ).

nameMeanings.name: Lucas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: In part a learned form of Luke , in part a transferred use of the surname derived from it in the Middle Ages. The Latin form Lucas was often used in the Middle Ages in written documents in place of the spoken vernacular form Luke, hence the common surname. It is also the spelling preferred in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, which has had some influence on its selection as a given name. There has been a sharp rise in its popularity since the turn of the century. Lucas is now also used as an Anglicized form of various Eastern European equivalents ( see the cognates listed at Luke ).

variants.name: Luke
meanings: Middle English vernacular form of Lucas , Latin form of the post-classical Greek name Loukas ‘man from Lucania’. This owes its perennial popularity throughout Christian Europe to the fact that, from the 2nd century onwards, the third gospel in the New Testament has been ascribed to the Lucas or Luke mentioned at various places in Acts and in the Epistles. Little is known about him beyond the facts that he was a doctor, a Gentile, and a friend and convert of St Paul. The name was borne by the character Luke Skywalker in the film Star Wars ( 1977 ), and rose sharply in popularity in the 1990s.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Lucas Cusack , Baron of Killeen was born in 1333, in Ireland, Orkney, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Walter Cusack Baron of Clonee and Killeen, was 37 and his mother, Joan Tuite, was 25. He married Mathilde Fleming about 1368, in Ulster, Ireland. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died after September 1388, in Killeen, County Meath, Ireland, and was buried in Ireland, Orkney, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Lucas Cusack , Baron of Killeen est né en 1333, à Ireland, Orkney, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Walter Cusack Baron of Clonee and Killeen, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Joan Tuite, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Mathilde Fleming environ 1368, à Ulster, Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé après septembre 1388, à Killeen, County Meath, Irlande, et a été enterré à Ireland, Orkney, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Lucas Cusack , Baron of Killeen 1333 in Ireland, Orkney, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Walter Cusack Baron of Clonee and Killeen 37 und seine Mutter Joan Tuite 25. Er hat um 1368 in Ulster, Irland Mathilde Fleming geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb nach September 1388 in Killeen, County Meath, Irland und wurde in Ireland, Orkney, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Lucas Cusack , Baron of Killeen è nato il nel 1333 nel Ireland, Orkney, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Walter Cusack Baron of Clonee and Killeen, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Joan Tuite, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Mathilde Fleming circa 1368, nel Ulster, Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì dopo il settembre 1388, nel Killeen, County Meath, Irlanda, e fu sepolto a Ireland, Orkney, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Lucas Cusack , Baron of Killeenが1333年にイギリススコットランドオルクニーアイレランドで生まれた時，父Walter Cusack Baron of Clonee and Killeenは37歳，母Joan Tuiteは25歳であった。約1368年にアイルランドウルスターでMathilde Flemingと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1388年9月以後にアイルランドコウントイ メアスキリーンで死去し，イギリススコットランドオルクニーアイレランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Lucas Cusack , Baron of Killeen(이)가 1333년 영국 스코틀랜드 르니 이렐랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Walter Cusack Baron of Clonee and Killeen(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Tuite(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1368년 아일랜드 울스터에서 Mathilde Fleming(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1388년 9월 이후 아일랜드 카운티 미스 킬린에서 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 르니 이렐랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Lucas Cusack , Baron of Killeen nasceu em 1333, em Ireland, Orkney, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Walter Cusack Baron of Clonee and Killeen, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Joan Tuite, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Mathilde Fleming aproximadamente 1368, em Ulster, Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu após setembro de 1388, em Killeen, County Meath, Irlanda, e foi sepultado em Ireland, Orkney, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Lucas Cusack , Baron of Killeen родился в 1333 г. в местности иреланд, орни, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Walter Cusack Baron of Clonee and Killeen было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Tuite, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Mathilde Fleming около 1368 г. в местности улстир, Ирландия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер после сентябрь 1388 г. в местности киллин, коунти мит, Ирландия и был похоронен в местности иреланд, орни, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Lucas Cusack , Baron of Killeen nació en 1333, en Ireland, Orkney, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Walter Cusack Baron of Clonee and Killeen, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Joan Tuite, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Mathilde Fleming aproximadamente 1368, en Ulster, Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió después de septiembre de 1388, en Killeen, County Meath, Irlanda, y fue sepultado en Ireland, Orkney, Escocia, Reino Unido.
